note: Standalone microbench median (do_bench, return_mode='median') on GB10 sm_121, bf16, shape (1,512,6144). This is the codegen-vs-codegen baseline the harness uses for speedup_vs_inductor. The earlier value (361.3 us) was a profiler aggregate -- inflated and not directly comparable. Source: extract/microbench_inductor.json (key 'swiglu_us').
